title: /plg
text: /plg Puts messages in the specified log file. /plg = LogFIle Parameters LogFile —name of a log file in which to place Uniface messages, including warnings and errors. Use With Any Uniface application, such as ide.exe , urm . Description The /plg switch enables you to use a log file without having an assignment file. If an assignment file is used, /plg overrides $PUTMESS_LOG_FILE in the assignment file, if present. Related Links $PUTMESS_LOG_FILE Copy the message frame contents to one or more files.
